title: Hidecraft Modpack
description: Modpack for the Hidecraft Server. Includes Create (with Aeronautics), Farmer's Delight, and exploration mods. Designed to give a "low modded" Vanilla+Create feeling.
body:
This is the modpack for the Hidecraft server. It is designed around the latest version of Create and tries to adhere to a "lowly modded" feeling, where everything feels consistent within a Vanilla+Create world.

Here is a highlight of the core mods included:

## Technology
The technology side is based around [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) with many of its add-ons. This includes train mods and the new Aeronautics. The design of the pack is to make players invest in infrastructure to connect bases through train or plane travel.

There is also [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) with many of its add-ons for some fun farming and cooking.

Also there's vanilla+ content mods such as [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark).

## Exploration
Exploration is expanded upon using several of [Yung's mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/refresh-studios) and [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics).
[Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr) and [Plushables](https://modrinth.com/mod/plushables) add everything for your collecting needs!
A lot more mobs (including our beloved raccoons) can be found thanks to [Living Things](https://modrinth.com/mod/living-things).

Elytra are nerfed to entice players to invest in Create-based travel infrastructure instead.

## Others

[Visual Effects +](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-effects-plus) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) provide visual fidelity without ruining the vanilla vibe.
There is built-in proximity chat support through [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).
Your typical performance mods are included too.

## Notes

This modpack is based on [Create+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create_plus) with several additions.
